name: session-bridge
description: ChatGPT credential converter with AT and RT validation on Cloudflare Pages.

scripts.build: bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run typecheck && bun test && vite build && bun run scripts/check-build.ts
scripts.dev:pages: bun run build && wrangler pages dev
scripts.deploy: bun run build && bunx --bun wrangler pages deploy
